"'''Gone To Ground'''" was an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'', which appeared in the sourcebook [[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']].

==Plot summary==
The adventure opens with an attack on the [[Syndaar Military Prep School]] committed by the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]]. System Sub-Commander [[Jared Brojtal]], an Imperial officer whose son was killed in the attack, puts all his efforts into tracking down Ort Hoogra-D'En at the same time that a group of bounty hunters learn of the impressive bounty placed on the Ho'Din.

The players follow clues to Ort's trail from [[Celanon/Legends|Celanon]] to [[Pallaxides]]. They arrive around the same time as the Imperial forces led by Brojtal. The characters must move quickly to capture Hoogr-D'En and survive the Imperial assault.
